text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The time has come! I'm going to<n>show everyone
at the pool how super<n>fun I really am!

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Um, Scarlet, how come you're<n>wearing your
school swimsuit? I<n>thought we were just gonna
hang<n>out?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is no time for fun and games!<n>Today's the
real test!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I don't get it, but I'll join you!

Eager to showcase her polished<n>reactions,
Daiwa Scarlet starts<n>playing in earnest.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! Oh my gosh! Staaahp! ♪ Thewater's, like, literally freezing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yikes! That water slide is, like, soooo<n>up there!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff. Well, Spe? Did allthose reactions seem fun andnatural?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Not sure what's going on here, but<n>yeah, totally!

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, anyone else want to order<n>anything? One
sec... I'd like one<n>whipped vanilla frappe, please!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Food, huh? All right, I'll take a large<n>curry and a
large ramen...

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text: You're that hungry?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, apparently. All this fun is hard<n>work, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. She's really taking this stuff<n>seriously,
isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
You think? I feel like she takes<n>everything super
seriously, though.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Scarlet, look! They're having a<n>swimsuit
dance competition!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A dance competition... That sounds<n>like the
perfect opportunity to show<n>how fun I am!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Let's do it! Time to show off our<n>moves, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Look at her! She's in her<n>school
swimsuit!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text: Why's she scowling like that?! She's<n>hysterical!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (Yes! Yes! They're seeing howfun I am!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(But I can't let up! I have to focus on<n>dancing
until the very end!)
And so the day comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Great job! Looks like we all had a ton<n>of fun!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So, everyone, was I funny today?

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text: You were hilarious! Just like always!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? You mean nothing seemed<n>different today?

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Nope. You're always so serious<n>about
everything. I don't think I'll<n>ever get tired of it.

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
But you were especially hilarious<n>today! Let's
hang out again<n>sometime soon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you, from before. Fancy<n>seeing you here.
choice_data_list:
On your way home? Were you hanging out with
friends?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And I tried really hard to be less<n>of a
stick-in-the-mud...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I guess I'm not actually as boring<n>as I
thought I was.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Still, I think my efforts paid off today.<n>I'm just
going to keep tackling things<n>head-on as they
come my way.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thanks a lot for listening! See you<n>later!

She continues her journey home with<n>a spring in
her step and a smile on<n>her face—the face of
someone who's<n>anything but boring.

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you were, like, weirdly<n>overenthusiastic.
Which made it even<n>funnier, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text: Was she always that animated,<n>though?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! Scarlet's always been on<n>the wild side!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You should have seen that dual-wield<n>slipper
technique she used against<n>Vodka that one time!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey, Spe! You've said<n>enough! Stop!
Please!

Her shouts of protest echo through<n>the air. It
seems like all her hard work<n>has made her a
source of surreal<n>comedy.
